item_specifications.special_feature: Cooling, Orthopedic, Removable Cover, Washable, Water Resistant

about_item: Give Your Pet Deep, Restful Sleep: Our orthopedic bed is engineered to deliver true joint relief for Large dogs and senior dogs up to 75 lbs. By cushioning pressure points and improving circulation, the solid orthopedic foam slab promotes a more restorative sleep, so your best friend wakes up happy and refreshed.

A Perfect Fit For Every Sleep Style: Don't settle for a rigid, one-size-fits-all bed. Our open-style lounger is designed for your pet's unique habits, creating a calming dog bed space measuring at 45”L x 30"W x 6"H. We crafted the bolstered edges to provide a secure headrest for "leaners," while the open sleep surface gives "sprawlers" the room they need to stretch out in total comfort.

Wash It, Dry It, Done: A dirty pet bed can fill your home with odors and allergens. Our washable dog bed makes cleanup effortless. The zippered, removable cover is fully machine washable, allowing you to easily lift away shed fur and dander for a truly hygienic sleep space.

True Orthopedic Support: Stop buying beds that flatten. We engineered this orthopedic dog bed with solid, high-density memory foam to provide deep, lasting structural comfort. The thick foam core gently contours to your pet’s unique shape, soothing aching joints and relieving pressure points. A superior choice among dog beds, it delivers resilient support that bounces back, nap after nap.

A Dog Bed For Every Size & Space: Whether you need a big dog bed or a cozy spot for a smaller pup, we offer a wide range of sizes to fit every breed. This isn't just a standard dog bed, it’s a sleep solution that fits your real life from living rooms to crates to cars. Designed with orthopedic support to handle dogs of any size and daily wear, this washable dog bed gives your best friend a dedicated, comfortable place to crash, no matter where the day takes them.

features.title: Color: Gray
features.text: Inviting in form and function, this super cozy bed is designed to provide optimum comfort for pets of all ages. The ergonomic design features a contoured form factor that cradles your pet for enhanced orthopedic and therapeutic support.

features.title: Sleep Surface
features.text: The luxurious faux fur sleep surface carries an irresistibly eye-catching swirl pattern that further enhances its look and feel, complementing the micro suede covered sides.

features.title: Ergonomic Design
features.text: The depressed center serves to cradle your pet for a good night's rest, while the ends slope upwards for extra high-loft comfort and orthopedic support for both hips and spine.

features.title: Orthopedic Foam Base
features.text: Dense and sturdy, the thick orthopedic foam slab provides superior comfort and even greater support for aching joints so pets can enjoy a more restorative night's rest. The foam also holds insulating properties to help keep your best friend warm and cozy in their sleep.

features.title: CertiPUR-US Certified Foam
features.text: Our foam is 100% manufactured in the USA and independently tested through the CertiPUR-US program to ensure that it meets the standards for content, emissions, and durability.* To reduce our carbon footprint, our beds may be shipped under compression; allow up to 48 hours for the foam to expand and regain its original shape.

features.title: Sizes & Dimensions
features.text: Small: 14" x 21" x 4"; For dogs up to 12 lbs

summary.text: Customers find the dog bed to be of great quality, soft, and comfortable, with one noting it's not too hard like memory foam beds. They appreciate its size, being perfect for large breeds like German Shepherds and Great Danes, and its washable removable cover makes it easy to keep clean. The durability receives mixed feedback - while some say it holds up well, others report it completely falling apart. Value for money is also mixed, with some finding it well worth the price while others say it's not worth the cost.

insights.title: Quality
insights.summary: Customers find the dog bed to be of great quality.

examples.snippet: ...But that was as good as it got! I really do think this is a great bed and at a terrific price so I’m giving it 5 stars despite the picky poodle!
Great dog bed. Still in great shape a year later! First dog bed our 100 lb. golden has not destroyed. Soft, but keeps its shape . Easy to clean....
...The bed seems to be really good quality and durable. I ordered the plush cover and it is very soft. My dog is a cocker spaniel mix and weighs 20 lbs....
Two months later and the bed is holding up shape. Its nice and firm. Keeps my 80 lb pitbull and her 30 lb pittie brother comfortable as you can see....

insights.title: Softness
insights.summary: Customers find the dog bed soft and very cushioned, with one customer noting that the foam is thick but not too hard like memory foam beds.

examples.snippet: ...It has lots of support, but is soft. The cover is easy to launder, does not shrink in a pretty hot dryer, and is easy to get on and off. I LOVE it.
This bed is wonderful! It is very soft and my dogs LOVE it! Originally bought if for our Great Dane, but our Golden loves it too and they SHARE IT!...
...Its very well made, and I think it will hold up really well. Its super soft, and the brown fuzzy color is very pretty and looks nice in my livingroom...
Two months later and the bed is holding up shape. Its nice and firm. Keeps my 80 lb pitbull and her 30 lb pittie brother comfortable as you can see....

insights.title: Comfort
insights.summary: Customers find the dog bed comfortable, particularly for large dogs, with one customer noting there's plenty of room to get comfortable.

Seems to be very durable, it’s very soft, good sized, I have a German Shepherd and she is very comfortable on it and she is not a small dog....

insights.title: Value for money
insights.summary: Customers have mixed opinions about the dog bed's value for money, with some finding it well worth the price and appreciating its high quality, while others feel it's not worth the cost, particularly noting that the price has doubled in six years.

examples.snippet: This was definitely worth the money. My dog loves the support of the raised ends for his neck and head. It is super soft and very easy to clean.
Great bed at a great price! Needed a large bed without being to bulky for the space and this bed was exactly what I was looking for.
I so wanted to like this bed. Not worth the money. At first my dogs wouldn’t even lay on it. They do now, but it never really fluffed up....
...So happy we spent a little more and bought this bed for him. Worth every penny and more. Couldn't be happier.

authors_reviews.title: Stylish, Comfortable, and Worth Every Penny - Our Labs Love It!
authors_reviews.text: We absolutely love the Furhaven Orthopedic Dog Bed for Large Dogs!! Not only is it super comfortable and supportive for our dogs' joints, but it also looks great in our home. The color is exactly as pictured and complements our decor perfectly.The removable, washable cover is easy to take off and put back on and makes cleaning a breeze. The quality feels durable and long lasting. We usually have 2 large labs sharing it at the same time, and it still holds up beautifully without losing shape. Considering the comfort, design, and durability, this bed is excellent value for the money.It comes in a box fully assembled, just cut the bag open and watch it expand.The only small downside is that it's not waterproof, so spills or accidents need to be cleaned promptly. Even so, all our dogs (4 of them) love it, we love it, and we highly recommend it for anyone looking for a stylish, high quality, and functional bed for large dogs!
authors_reviews.author: Midwest Mom

authors_reviews.title: Quality product - could not be happier
authors_reviews.text: I labored over which bed to buy my 75-pound treeing walker coonhound. She's nine and arthritis is starting to set in. I really wanted a bed this size (I got the XL), but I wanted it to have four inches of foam at the lowest point of the bed. I could only get more thickness if I went up a size (in any brand I found), and the next size up was enormous. I measured and could not figure out where I would put a bed that size!? I bit the bullet and bought this one because of the reviews. It was a good price and I figured if it didn't work I wasn't out too much. I could always buy two and stack them. However, this bed is the perfect size. I could definitely fit two dogs on this bed, there's plenty of room for her to stretch out and have a friend on there. More importantly, the foam, even though it's only 2.5 inches at the lowest point, it does not crush when her weight is distributed on it. She really looks like she finds comfort in the ends being curved up. It's like she's being cradled. Overall, she loves her new bed, and it is so neat and tidy looking, unlike many that just look like a blob on the floor. It is soft, the cover is easy to remove, and I think it's going to last a long time. I'm very happy with this purchase.
authors_reviews.author: Holly B Knight

authors_reviews.title: Jumbo plus perfect for 76lb Pitbull
authors_reviews.text: So, we have only had this bed a few days, so I can't say how long it will hold up for. However, I wanted to write a review right away for a couple reasons. My dog was having a severe issue with his arthritis for the last week. So, we decided to get him a good solid bed. He is a Pitbull mix. He is 76lbs. I was on the fence on which size to buy. I ended up buying the jumbo plus size, which says it's for dogs up to 150lbs. I'm telling you, my dog, in a regular sleeping position, has his head on one side that sticks up like a pillow, and his body fills out a very heavy portion of the rest of the bed. Its perfect size for him. So this tells me 2 things. had I gone with the bed that said up to 75lb, he would have been way too big for that. And this jumbo plus bed i got says up to 150lbs... Well, if your dog is that big, I would definitely get the giant size one instead. because my 76lb dog fills this one out nicely. I mean if your dog is like 90lbs, i think it would be comfortable, but anything bigger than that, i would probably size up. in my opinion. Anyway, this bed is excellent for leg pain in dogs. its already helped my dog a ton. Its very well made, and I think it will hold up really well. Its super soft, and the brown fuzzy color is very pretty and looks nice in my livingroom. dimensions are 4x3 its huge, so make sure you measure for it. mine puffed up right out of the box. i would definitely recommend.
authors_reviews.author: Amanda

authors_reviews.title: Great bed, washable cover, soft but sturdy
authors_reviews.text: I love this bed. We have a 70-75 lb long basset hound and I got the largest bed. Even when he stretches out on his side it's still big. Love the raised sides- he loves to put his face there. We have beds for him in multiple rooms plus a kitchen cuz he keeps following us and it's hard tile floor on an older doggo body,you know...so mama got him beds in many rooms. This one is cool,sturdy but soft,as advertised, orthopedic. Had it several months now,washed it several times, it holds up. Folding it back into the cover is a bit tricky so I make my hubby deal with it 😂 bed is fuzzy/soft on the outside,I dry it in the dryer and it comes out fine,not ruined like some other fuzzy things. Color held up too. Love it.
authors_reviews.author: ratZ

authors_reviews.title: So far so good
authors_reviews.text: We’ve only had this bed for a couple weeks but so far so good!My dog will actually use this bed which is more than I can say for others we’ve tried out.She’s a 55ish lb GSD/Husky mix, around a year and a half old.She tends to prefer the floor (Even though she’s young I worry about her joint health longterm), likes to sleep in weird positions, and also loves to steal our pillows for naps.The sloped ends of this bed are perfect for that and the Jumbo size seems to be just enough space for her to stretch out and be comfy. The thickness of the foam is more than enough for her weight too.I don’t see this bed being SUPER durable longterm - she does dig at it before laying down and I’ve already noticed a (very small) hole. Keeping a blanket ontop she can mess up instead helps to mitigate but we’ll see.I do appreciate the option to purchase extra covers from the manufacturer, but wish they had more durable fabric options.If your pup isn’t a digger or chewer you should be fine.Can’t speak to how easy it is to clean since we haven’t tried washing it yet.Overall I’m pleased with the bed and the balance between price, size, and quality.
authors_reviews.author: Rebecca

other_countries_reviews.title: Great bed
other_countries_reviews.text: So we’ve had this dog bed for over a month, but I can honestly say that it’s the first one that has lived up to the expectations. Everything’s as advertised, the lining is easily washable and my dog even sometimes decides to go for his bed instead of our sofa, which is the highest praise
other_countries_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

other_countries_reviews.title: Pésima calidad de material
other_countries_reviews.text: A la primera lavada se encogió la telaEl cierre se rompió inmediatamente
other_countries_reviews.author: Griselda

other_countries_reviews.title: Nice Quality!
other_countries_reviews.text: This bed is really nicely made. The cover doesn’t show the hair too badly. I find that it vacuums great with my Dyson stick vacuum on low power. I have a 55 lb Shepherd-Husky and she absolutely loves this bed. The raised bolsters on the ends seem to be very comfortable to rest her head on. The foam seems to be a good quality and supports her well. I would definitely recommend this.
other_countries_reviews.author: Sandra
